name: FormField
description: Multi-line text field. Identical chrome contract to [input](./input.md) — transparent-fill box whose visible stroke is an inset box-shadow (never a `border`, so the field's footprint is pixel-stable across every state), 16px text in `body.md`, optional `label` above and `helper` / `maxLength` below. Diverges only on the inner element: a `<textarea>` instead of a single-line `<input>`, with a configurable `rows` rung (default 4) and a vertical-only resize handle. Same `label` / `helper` / `maxLength` group rules as input — multi-line + character count is the canonical Chorus pairing for any composition field that bounds the message length.

label.description: Visible label rendered above the field box and associated with it (`<label htmlFor>`).

helper.description: Assistive text rendered below the field box, left-aligned. Same rules as [input.helper](./input.md): mutually exclusive with `maxLength`, optional on every appearance, re-tones to `sys.color.error` on the error appearance.

maxLength.description: Caps the value length and renders a `current/max` character count below the box, right-aligned. Mutually exclusive with `helper`.

rows.description: Minimum visible rows. The textarea is `resize: vertical` so the user can pull it taller; the value never shrinks below `rows`.

group.description: Wrapper around the label + box + helper/count, present only when at least one of `label` / `helper` / `maxLength` is supplied. Delegates to the input/textarea-shared group spec.

label.description: Visible label above the box. `sys.typo.label.md`, `sys.color.onSurface`. Associated with the textarea via `htmlFor`.

container.description: The box — owns the transparent fill, the stroke (an inset box-shadow), radius, padding, focus ring. Same chrome as input; differs only in `align-items: stretch` so the inner textarea fills the box height.

textarea.description: The editable multi-line text. `body.md` typo, `resize: vertical`, `rows` minimum. Carries `aria-describedby` pointing at the helper / count when present. No trailing clear button — the value can be long enough that wiping it via a single click is hostile; the user clears multi-line content by selecting text.

helper.description: Assistive text below the box. Same rules as input.helper.

count.description: `current/max` character count below the box, right-aligned. Same rules as input.count.

active.note: Stroke steps from `hairline` (1px) to `activeStrokeWeight` (2px) as an inset box-shadow — same pixel-stable contract as input.

focusIndicator.compositionReason: Action affordance with breathing room around it; the 3px outward extent is reserved by the surrounding layout.
focusIndicator.trigger: :focus-visible (keyboard / programmatic focus, never plain mouse click)

forbidden: raw <textarea> styled with Tailwind / inline color — the textarea is wrapped in the chorus-field chrome that owns the stroke
auto-grow without bounds — the textarea has a `rows` floor; tall content is reachable by the user via the resize handle, not by an uncapped programmatic grow
horizontal resize handle — only the vertical handle is allowed (`resize: vertical`); horizontal resize breaks the parent column's rhythm
trailing clear button — multi-line content is too costly to wipe in one click
stroke painted via `border:` — stroke is an inset box-shadow on the field
